title: tragacantha keratensis
intro: Tragacantha keratensis, also known as the prickly thistle, is a type of flowering plant in the aster family, characterized by its thistle-like appearance and spiny leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Tragacantha keratensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support the immune system, making it a popular natural remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems.
